message:
test(proptest): add 23 property-based tests for replay_capture module

Covers serde roundtrips for CaptureSensitivityTier, CaptureRedactionMode,
CaptureRedactionPolicy, DecisionType, DecisionEvent; ordering invariants;
fnv1a_hash_text determinism and collision resistance; sha256_hex format,
length, and determinism; summarize_decision_input length bounding and
UTF-8 safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
